creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Feedback timeout. The idea is good behind this proposed new port, but I can't 
extract human-readable data from the enclosed archive. If you feel like 
continue working on this port, feel free to submit a follow-up to this 
PR ticket so that we can get it to the repo. 

Regards, 
Gabor
